methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 3 same-sector + same-stage peers in Biotech & Health. Range: $529M - $2.6B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Biotech & Health P/S median is 5.8x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

private.name: Freenome
private.rationale: Same sector (Biotech & Health), same stage (Public), post-money $2.6B

private.name: Recursion Pharmaceuticals

private.name: Alto Neuroscience
private.rationale: Same sector (Biotech & Health), same stage (Public), post-money $529M

data.narrative:
Tempus AI is a public-stage biotech and health company founded by Eric Lefkofsky that has raised $1.1B+ and carries a current valuation of $6B+. The peer universe comprises 3 public and 8 private companies in the same sector and stage, with sampled comps including Freenome ($2.6B), Recursion Pharmaceuticals ($1.8B), and Alto Neuroscience ($529M).

The peer-median method is the applicable triangulation approach here. Using 3 same-sector, same-stage peers, the median implied valuation is $1.8B, with a range spanning $529M to $2.6B. Public-comp anchoring via price-to-sales multiples cannot be applied because Tempus AI's revenue is not on file; while the Biotech & Health sector P/S median across 3 public tickers (RXRX, TEM, ONT.L) is 5.8x, the absence of target revenue data precludes meaningful application of this method.

The triangulated analysis supports a valuation range of $1.5B to $2.1B, centered at $1.8B. The material discrepancy between this range and the company's stated $6B+ valuation warrants scrutiny. Key uncertainties include the representativeness of the peer set, the currency of Tempus AI's most recent financing round, and any post-IPO revenue inflection not captured in comparable company metrics. The single applicable method limits confidence; additional revenue or transaction data would strengthen the analysis.
